## Analyzers (2)

### [Mnemonic_pDNS_Public v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/MnemonicPDNS/Mnemonic_pDNS_Public.json)
Query IP addresses and domains against Mnemonic pDNS public service.

- **Author:** Michael Stensrud, Nordic Financial CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`

### [Mnemonic_pDNS_Closed v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/MnemonicPDNS/Mnemonic_pDNS_Closed.json)
Query IP addresses and domains against Mnemonic pDNS restricted service.

- **Author:** Michael Stensrud, Nordic Financial CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`
